name: Status Machine Enforcement

step_02_create_trip_no_status.detail: CreateTrip with no status returned PLANNING as expected

step_03_create_trip_active_status.detail: CreateTrip with status=TRIP_STATUS_ACTIVE returned ACTIVE as expected (PR #197)

step_06_update_trip2_active_to_completed.detail: ACTIVE -> COMPLETED transition succeeded for trip-2

step_07_completed_to_planning.detail: COMPLETED -> PLANNING correctly rejected with failed_precondition
step_07_completed_to_planning.error_message: invalid trip status transition: completed → planning

step_08_completed_to_active.detail: COMPLETED -> ACTIVE correctly rejected with failed_precondition
step_08_completed_to_active.error_message: invalid trip status transition: completed → active

step_09_trip2_completed_to_planning.detail: COMPLETED -> PLANNING correctly rejected with failed_precondition (trip-2)
step_09_trip2_completed_to_planning.error_message: invalid trip status transition: completed → planning

step_10_create_trip_completed_status.detail: CreateTrip with COMPLETED status correctly rejected with invalid_argument

step_11_get_trip_nonexistent_uuid.detail: GetTrip with non-existent UUID correctly returned not_found

step_12_get_trip_invalid_uuid.error_message: validation error: id: value must be a valid UUID

planning_to_completed_skip_active.detail: PLANNING -> COMPLETED is allowed (skip ACTIVE). Intentional design — users can cancel a trip without starting it.

active_to_planning_backward.detail: ACTIVE -> PLANNING correctly rejected with failed_precondition
active_to_planning_backward.error_message: invalid trip status transition: active → planning

create_trip_garbage_status.detail: Unrecognized status string 'TRIP_STATUS_GARBAGE' silently defaults to PLANNING. Expected protobuf enum behavior (unknown maps to 0/UNSPECIFIED).

status_machine_summary.error_code_correctness: ALL CORRECT — no 'internal' errors where specific codes expected

summary: All 12 core tests and 3 extra edge-case tests PASSED. The trip status machine is correctly enforced: forward transitions (PLANNING->ACTIVE->COMPLETED) succeed, backward transitions are rejected with 'failed_precondition' (not 'internal'), CreateTrip with COMPLETED is rejected with 'invalid_argument', GetTrip returns correct codes for not_found and invalid_argument. PLANNING->COMPLETED (skip ACTIVE) is allowed by design. No regressions found.
